headline: Dell Technologies (DELL) Wins Political And AI Attention, Is The Valuation Still Compelling?
summary: Dell Technologies (DELL) has turned into both a political and AI story, with President Donald Trump repeatedly urging Americans to buy Dell computers just as the company’s AI server business gains national attention. See our latest analysis for Dell Technologies. Dell Technologies’ share price has swung sharply on political headlines and AI optimism, with a 30 day share price return of 5.8% and a roughly 125% 90 day gain, while the 1 year total shareholder return of about 241% points to...

headline: Will Dell’s Tougher Shareholder Proposal Rules Reshape Its AI Strategy And Governance Balance (DELL)?
summary: In early July 2026, Dell Technologies’ board amended its bylaws to opt into Texas TBOC Section 21.373, tightening eligibility and solicitation requirements for shareholder proposals at its meetings. This governance shift raises the bar for investor participation in Dell’s formal decision-making, potentially concentrating influence among larger, longer-term shareholders who can meet the new thresholds. With these tougher shareholder proposal rules now in place, we’ll examine how this...
